name: ICT + SMC Dashboard
author: janardhanachary
description: Комбинация ICT concepts + SMC + Session Analysis + Order Blocks + Liquidity Sweeps + MSS + AMD (Power of 3)

entry_buy: ICT Bullish:OTE (Optimal Trade Entry) в зоне 61.8-78.6% Fib
SMC: Bullish Order Block + FVG confluence
Liquidity sweep: стопы быков сняты ниже swing low
entry_sell: SMC: Bearish Order Block + FVG confluence
Liquidity sweep: стопы медведей сняты выше swing high

implementation_note: Полная ICT+SMC система: Kill Zones + Order Blocks + Liquidity + AMD + MSS
